sections.content:

- Clicking cross at (19, 30) created G border + g pattern at destination

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
from collections import Counter

seg = current_frame.segmentation
g_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'g']
print(f"g nodes: {len(g_nodes)}")

# Find g pattern center
all_rows = []
all_cols = []
for n in g_nodes:
    for p in n['boundary']:
        all_rows.append(p[0])
        all_cols.append(p[1])

center_row = (min(all_rows) + max(all_rows)) // 2
center_col = (min(all_cols) + max(all_cols)) // 2
print(f"g pattern: rows [{min(all_rows)},{max(all_rows)}], cols [{min(all_cols)},{max(all_cols)}], center=({center_row},{center_col})")

# Click the g pattern to move the cross
print(f"\n=== Click g pattern at ({center_row}, {center_col}) ===")
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': center_row, 'col': center_col}])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
N_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"After move: N={len(N_nodes)}")
for n in N_nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"  row=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}], col=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}]")

# Check grid
print("\nGrid area (row 17-22):")
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for i in range(17, 23):
    print(f"{i}: {ascii_lines[i][10:48]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
